name: Mission Huntdown
overview: ATS officer Mahid starts hunting down an emerging terrorist group in Bangladesh, the JKB. When his path collides with one of the militant's wives, they use each other in their own missions for truth, revenge and closure.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Mission Huntdown(মিশন হান্টডাউন) | FS Nayeem | Bidya Sinha Mim|28th June| hoichoi
